active_planning_focus: Lock v0.3 visual identity and README pamphlet direction.
last_planning_summary: The v0.3 visual identity plan accepts README as a product pamphlet, uses a local deterministic SVG hero, keeps important product copy in Markdown text, bans emoji, foreignObject, external fonts, external references, and long text from core SVGs, keeps README.ko within English canonical claims, treats remote capsule-style renderers as inspiration only, and guards README/assets through regression checks. The CLI readiness gate reported READY and relock wrote .ni/plan.lock.json.

recent_decisions.title: v0.3 visual identity is local deterministic SVG plus Markdown copy

recent_risks.title: Visual identity drifts into fragile or overclaiming README surface

notes.planning_aid_only: Session state is a planning aid, not authority.
notes.locked_docs: Session state must not override locked docs.
notes.completion: Session state must not mark docs complete.
notes.raw_transcript: Raw transcript is not the source of truth.
